transcript.message: Hello, thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter at FinSpark, a fintech company that's passionate about leveraging AI to drive innovation in the financial sector. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Anil Chowdary, nice to speak with you, Rohan. Currently, I'm working as an HR Manager at Hooli, where I've been focusing on implementing various HR initiatives to streamline our recruitment process and improve employee engagement. I've also been involved in some projects related to talent acquisition and retention, leveraging tools like LangChain and Pinecone to enhance our hiring strategy.

That sounds like some really interesting work, Anil. Although your current role is in HR, I'm curious about your background in AI engineering. Can you tell me a bit about your technical experience and how it relates to this Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark?

I actually started my career as a software professional, working on various projects involving Node.js, React, and JavaScript. Although my current role is in HR, my technical background has been helpful in understanding the technical aspects of our HR initiatives, and I've been able to leverage my skills in tools like Figma and Illustrator to create visual aids for our recruitment process.

It's great that you've been able to apply your technical skills in creative ways, Anil. However, I'm looking for someone with a strong background in AI engineering, particularly in areas like embeddings-based retrieval systems and vector databases. Can you tell me about any relevant technical projects or experiences you've had in these areas, even if they were outside of your current role?

I've had some experience with fine-tuning LLMs and working with FAISS for vector search, although it's been a while since I've actively worked on those projects. In my previous role, I was involved in a project where we used RAG to build a recommendation system, and I've also dabbled in prompt engineering to improve the performance of our LLMs.

It sounds like you have some relevant experience in AI engineering, Anil. I'm curious to know, what sparked your interest in this Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark, and what do you think you can bring to our team in this capacity?

I'm drawn to FinSpark's mission to leverage AI in the financial sector, and I believe my technical background and experience in AI engineering could be a good fit for the company. I think I can bring a unique perspective to the team, having worked in both technical and non-technical roles, and I'm excited about the opportunity to contribute to a company that's pushing the boundaries of innovation in this space.

It's great to hear that you're excited about the opportunity, Anil. Now that we've discussed your background and interest in the role, I'd like to talk about compensation. Can you tell me what you're currently earning in your role as an HR Manager at Hooli, and what you're expecting in terms of salary for a Senior AI Engineer position?
I'm not comfortable discussing my current salary, Rohan. However, I can tell you that I'm open to discussing compensation for the Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark.

Thank you so much, Anil, for taking the time to speak with me today. I really appreciate your candor and honesty about your current role and expectations. I'll be in touch within the next few days to discuss next steps and answer any additional questions you may have. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your job search and hope our paths cross again soon.

It was a pleasure speaking with you too, Rohan. I appreciate the time you took to discuss the Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark, and I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon about next steps. I wish you and the FinSpark team all the best in your hiring process, and I hope our paths do cross again soon.
